title: DRW MD-DRW-502: Wing Skin & Spar Assembly
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-502 Rev B — Wing Skin & Spar Assembly

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1002, P-1003, P-1008, P-1009, P-1010, P-1011.
4. Drawn by Tobias Wren, checked by Felix Herrera, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
